entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A nutrient-rich grain containing antinutrients used in dough recipes for Injera

entities.name: MAIZE
entities.description: A grain used in composite dough recipes with pearl millet to prepare Injera

entities.name: ANTINUTRIENTS
entities.description: Substances that limit the bioavailability of minerals and the digestibility of starches and proteins

entities.name: BIOAVAILABILITY OF MINERALS
entities.description: The proportion of minerals from food that can be absorbed and used by the body

entities.name: DIGESTIBILITY OF STARCHES AND PROTEINS
entities.description: The extent to which starches and proteins are broken down during digestion

entities.name: FERMENTATION
entities.description: A biochemical process used to reduce antinutrient levels in dough recipes

entities.name: INJERA
entities.description: A traditional fermented flatbread consumed in Ethiopia

entities.name: ETHIOPIA
entities.description: The country where Injera is consumed and the study was conducted

entities.name: DANGESHITA SUB-DISTRICT
entities.description: A sub-district in Dangila District, Ethiopia

entities.name: DANGILA DISTRICT
entities.description: A district in Ethiopia

entities.name: PH
entities.description: A measure of acidity or alkalinity in the dough recipes

entities.name: TITRATABLE ACIDITY
entities.description: A measure of the total acid content in the dough recipes

entities.name: AEROBIC MESOPHILIC BACTERIA
entities.description: Bacteria that grow in the presence of oxygen at moderate temperatures

entities.name: MOLDS
entities.description: Fungi that decreased during the fermentation process

entities.name: YEASTS
entities.description: Fungi that increased during the later stages of fermentation

entities.name: LACTIC ACID BACTERIA
entities.description: Bacteria that increased during the later stages of fermentation

entities.name: LACTIC ACID FERMENTATION
entities.description: A fermentation process that yields lactic acid

entities.name: ALCOHOLIC FERMENTATION
entities.description: A fermentation process that yields alcohol and mannitol

entities.name: LACTIC ACID
entities.description: A primary end product of lactic acid fermentation

entities.name: MANNITOL
entities.description: A primary end product of the fermentation process

entities.name: PHYTATE
entities.description: An antinutrient degraded during the fermentation of dough recipes

entities.name: RAFFINOSE
entities.description: An antinutrient degraded during the fermentation of dough recipes
